note: Recorded worker outputs for the Module 5 multi-agent lab/assignment, so synthesize_outputs / a coordinator can be exercised with NO live earlier agent. Feed these strings to synthesize_outputs, or hand them to fake workers whose handle() returns the matching value.
task: Write a short guide to cycling to work.

workers.research: Cycling to work cuts commute cost and adds ~30 minutes of daily exercise.
workers.write: Cycling to work saves money and builds fitness into your day — start with a safe, short route.
workers.review: Clear and useful; add one safety line about lights and a helmet.
